case_title: ATLAS ELEVATOR CO. VS. BRUGNARA CORPORATION et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLAS ELEVATOR CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUGNARA CORPORATION BRUGNARA PROPERTIES 1 LP BRUGNARA, LUKE $2,857.60 PRINCIPAL, $139.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,996.85, PLAINTIFF PRESENT AT HEARING DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. MATTER HEARD BEFORE COMM. PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE. NO EXHIBITS, NOT REPORTED (506). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
